testimonials.title: What Modders Say
testimonials.description: Hear from car enthusiasts who created amazing builds with our configurator.

items.name: Alex Johnson
items.quote: The 3D visualization accuracy is incredible. I can see exactly how my modifications will look before installing them.

items.name: Maria Chen
items.quote: Finally, a configurator that feels like the real thing. The material simulation is spot-on and the customization options are endless.

items.name: Tom Rodriguez
items.quote: My customers love bringing me renders from this configurator. It saves us time and leads to better results since expectations are clearly defined.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have another question? Contact us on Discord or by email.

items.question: Is the configurator compatible with all car models?
items.answer: Our configurator supports over 450 popular car models, from classic to modern vehicles. If your model isn't available, you can request it through our feedback system.

items.question: How accurate are the 3D renders?
items.answer: Our renders are highly accurate, showing exact dimensions and material properties. The 3D models are sourced directly from manufacturers and updated regularly.

items.question: Can I save and share my builds?
items.answer: Yes! You can save your creations to your account and share them via social media or export high-quality renders for local shops.

items.question: Are there plans for VR support?
items.answer: We're actively developing VR support for an even more immersive experience. Beta access will be available to premium users soon.

cta.title: Start Creating Your Dream Car Today
